arts.ttl: Liverpool contract offer ‘short’ of Van Dijk expectations
arts.sum: Liverpool have made a contract offer to Virgil van Dijk as the club look to tie the captain down to a new deal. Van Dijk’s current contract expires at the end of the season, with the Dutch defender one of three high-profile players whose deals are nearing their conclusion. arts.ttl: Newcastle United and Aston Villa face similar PSR roadblock that has hampered Champions League ambition
arts.sum: One of the big talking points in English football this season is about the profit and sustainability (PSR) rules that have hit a number of Premier League clubs. The quartet began talking about PSR hurting the ambitions of new English clubs, Newcastle United and Aston Villa, in the past couple of seasons.

arts.ttl: Ornstein drops major Liverpool update on intense Salah, Van Dijk & Trent contract talks
arts.sum: David Ornstein has provided an update on the ongoing Liverpool contract situation, with an offer made to Virgil van Dijk, but seemingly not much progress yet on Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold.
